appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaytls: An object that represents a Transport Layer Security (TLS) validation context.

appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaytls.Description: A reference to an object that represents the SANs for a virtual gateway's listener's Transport Layer Security (TLS) validation context.
A reference to where to retrieve the trust chain when validating a peer’s Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate.
